originalTitle: Will the real Kevin Warsh please stand up? Ahead of his first Fed meeting, economists honestly don’t know what to expect.
summary: Perhaps the only thing that can be said with certainty about Kevin Warsh’s press conference following his first meeting as Federal Reserve chair this week is that he will have a captive audience.
content: Perhaps the only thing that can be said with certainty about Kevin Warsh’s press conference following his first meeting as Federal Reserve chair this week is that he will have a captive audience.
chineseTitle: 真正的凯文·沃什请站起来吗？在他第一次美联储会议之前，经济学家们老实说不知道会发生什么。
chineseSummary: 凯文·沃什本周作为美联储主席首次会议后的新闻发布会上，唯一可以肯定的是，他将拥有一群忠实的听众。
chineseContent: 凯文·沃什本周作为美联储主席首次会议后的新闻发布会上，唯一可以肯定的是，他将拥有一群忠实的听众。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
